query:
SELECT m.id, m.ploId, m.competencyId, m.weight, c.code as competencyCode, c.gaId 
FROM mappings m 
JOIN competencies c ON m.competencyId = c.id 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 582RunNG3RGjvE7.85f193ee7630 --database DF8hhJErzDeZBFGeijL5fW --execute SELECT m.id, m.ploId, m.competencyId, m.weight, c.code as competencyCode, c.gaId 
FROM mappings m 
JOIN competencies c ON m.competencyId = c.id 
LIMIT 20;
